title: Agents Picard/Jerry/Summers alignes sur L+ Skill Standard canon (2026-07-05 ratification)

agents_updated.l_plus_role: L0 CEO Bench foundation (Book dojo is sister) + H10 projects owner input to Book H1 aggregator
L+ Lighting keeper transversal - keep lights on = observabilite Business OS L2 canon
L+ Verse singer transversal - narrative poetry des 4 indicateurs Jerry + agregation Book H1

l_plus_skill_standard_10_invariants_appl: 1. Frontmatter YAML sur tout .md (valide pour les 3)
3. Append-only strict (nouvelle section ajoutee sans rewrite)
5. D1 receipts (D1 verifications faites via Python)
8. HITL queue visible (escalation paths documentes dans section L+)
9. Verify-first (verifie que les sources existent avant agregation)

loop_engineering_pattern.Picard_H10: input to Book H1 aggregator (MC) per ADR-LD01-008 D1 - MANIFEST.md per cycle
loop_engineering_pattern.Jerry_Lighting: input to Book H1 aggregator (MC) per ADR-LD01-008 D3 - 4 lights indicators per tick
